project.title: scorpion Centruroides vittatus venom proteomics
project.projectDescription: idenification and characterization of venom protein and peptide components from the scorpion Centruroides vittatus
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: trysin digestion & reverse phase column chromatography with eluted proteins ionized with electrospray and mass spectrometry
project.dataProcessingProtocol: scaffold analysis to verify MS/MS peptide and protein identifications

references.referenceLine: Bowman A, Fitzgerald C, Pummill JF, Rhoads DD, Yamashita T. Reduced Toxicity of Centruroides vittatus (Say, 1821) May Result from Lowered Sodium β Toxin Gene Expression and Toxin Protein Production. Toxins (Basel). 2021 13(11)
